data.title: Significant TON Transfer Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data reveals that at 17:22, a total of 1.431 million TON was transferred from an anonymous address starting with EQBFbbSC to another anonymous address beginning with Ef-YFgxiz. Following this transaction, a portion of the TON was moved to TON.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-12-06)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.11T, down by -2.19% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $88,056 and $91,564 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $89,619, down by -1.85%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include LUNC, LUNA, and ACE, up by 72%, 41%, and 30%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

XRP News: XRP Slides Below Key Support as Analysts Warn of Potential Retest of $2.05 Despite Strong ETF Inflows

data.title: CoinShares Debunks Tether Collapse Fears After Hayes Warning
data.description:
CoinShares head of research James Butterfill has rejected insolvency concerns surrounding Tether following warnings from BitMEX founder Arthur Hayes, pointing to over $181 billion in reserves against $174 billion liabilities with a $6. 78 billion surplus.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinshares-debunks-tether-collapse-fears-after-hayes-warning/

data.title: Do Kwon Sentencing: US Wants 12 Years for Terra’s $40 Billion Crash
data.description:
Federal prosecutors are seeking a 12-year prison term for Terraform Labs co-founder Do Kwon, whose algorithmic stablecoin fraud triggered a $40 billion market collapse that prosecutors say contributed to broader crypto contagion including FTX's failure.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/do-kwon-sentencing-us-wants-12-years-for-terras-40-billion-crash/
